6 OR 03
7 OR 14

Applying to 00100010
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 5 = 0
1 I 6 = 1
2 I 7 = 0
3 I 0 = 0
4 I 1 = 0
5 I 2 = 1
6 OR 03 = OR(I 0,I 3) = OR(0,0) = 0
7 OR 14 = OR(I 1,I 4) = OR(0,0) = 0

\boxed{01000100}
